message:
chore: sync beads tracker and add cross-platform CI report fixtures

- Sync latest concurrent agent beads issue tracker state
- Add tests/cross_platform_reports/linux/ fixture directory containing
  platform_report.json, platform_events.jsonl, and platform_report.md
  generated by the cross-platform CI matrix validation work (bd-1f42)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
